name: Anjali Sharma
quote: The ghee tastes like my grandmother's kitchen. After one month my children asked me to never buy supermarket ghee again. I have been a subscriber for two years.
avatarAlt: Portrait of Anjali Sharma, a smiling woman in her early forties

name: Dr. Rohan Mehta
quote: As a physician I am sceptical by training. But the difference in digestion after switching to A2 milk is real for my entire family. The glass-bottle delivery is the cherry on top.
avatarAlt: Portrait of Dr. Rohan Mehta, a man in a navy blue shirt

name: Kavita Iyer
quote: We visited the gaushala on Janmashtami. The cows are clearly cared for, the staff is reverent, and you can see where every rupee goes. That is rare.
avatarAlt: Portrait of Kavita Iyer wearing a green saree with gold border

name: Vikram Singh
quote: The Mathura peda is dangerously good. I bought one box, ordered three more the same week, then signed up for the monthly box. Worth every rupee.
avatarAlt: Portrait of Vikram Singh, a bearded man in a kurta
